title: Smart Copper Golems
description: Dumb Copper Golems open chests randomly — Smart Copper Golems scan item frames and actually know where items belong.
body:
Smart Copper Golems adds intelligent item transport and storage automation to Minecraft using vanilla-style mechanics.

Copper Golems can:

- Pick up items from Copper Chests
- Detect item frames on nearby chests
- Sort items into matching storage automatically
- Support multiple golems working together at the same time
- Use fallback storage when no matching chest exists

The mod is designed to feel natural and vanilla-friendly while making large storage systems more alive, interactive, and fun to build.

How It Works
- Place items inside a Copper Chest
- Put item frames on storage chests
- Copper Golems will automatically transport matching items to the correct chest

Example:

Diamond item frame → Diamonds go there
Iron item frame → Iron items go there
No matching chest → Uses miscellaneous fallback storage
